summary: Story Series Phase 2+3 + CTA A/B + UI Consistency testing complete. All 53 backend tests passed (100%). All 14 API endpoints verified including 6 new Phase 2+3 endpoints: branch-episode, public/{id}, share, enhance-characters, enhance-world, emotional-arc. Frontend verified: Dashboard ResumeYourStory shows series cards with badge/episode count/genre, SeriesTimeline has branch/share/enhance buttons, PublicSeries works without auth, CTA A/B placement experiment active with 3 variants (top/bottom/floating). UI consistency: tool cards min-h-[80px], trending h-full, recent items min-h-[56px] all verified.

issues: Shows 'No episodes available yet' because no episodes are in 'ready' status - this is expected behavior but may confuse users

critical_code_review_comments: story_series.py: All 14 endpoints properly implemented with auth enforcement (13 require auth, 1 public)
story_series.py (line 996-1020): GET /public/{id} correctly excludes user_id and only returns 'ready' episodes
story_series.py (line 1029-1043): POST /share correctly toggles is_public and returns share_url format /series/{id}
story_series.py (line 1053-1113): enhance-characters properly merges LLM-generated backstory/relationships with existing chars
story_series.py (line 1118-1158): enhance-world adds lore/locations/secrets to world bible
story_series.py (line 1163-1209): emotional-arc calculates avg_emotion/tension from scene emotions with proper scoring
ab_testing.py (line 257-268): cta_placement experiment seeded with 3 variants (top/bottom/floating) and primary_event 'generate_click'
ResumeYourStory.jsx: Series cards show Series badge, episode count, genre, timestamp, and next_hook
SeriesTimeline.js: Branch button on episodes, Share button in header showing Shared/Share state, Enhance buttons for characters/world
PublicSeries.js: Properly loads without auth, shows series info/characters/world and CTA to create own series
PublicCreation.js: ctaPosition variable correctly consumed from A/B variant_data to conditionally render CTA at top/bottom/floating
Dashboard.js: tool cards have min-h-[80px] (line 319), trending cards use h-full (line 395), recent items have min-h-[56px] (line 364)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'Fox Forest' series (series_id: ea2bc4e8-454d-4f40-8415-f4383593904a)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Series Phase 1+2+3 fully tested. 'Fox Forest' series has 4 episodes (1 failed, 2 planned mainline, 1 planned branch). Characters enhanced with backstory/relationships (Jasper, Luna, Roo). World enhanced with lore/locations. Series is public (is_public: true). CTA placement A/B experiment active with 3 variants. Public series page shows 0 episodes because none are in 'ready' status yet.

POST_branch_episode.evidence: Returns 401 without auth, 404 for invalid parent, 422 for missing fields

GET_public_series.evidence: Works without auth, returns series/episodes/bibles, excludes user_id, only ready episodes

POST_share.evidence: Returns 401 without auth, toggles is_public, returns share_url format /series/{id}

POST_enhance_characters.evidence: Returns 401 without auth, 404 for invalid series, 200 with enhanced characters

POST_enhance_world.evidence: Returns 401 without auth, 404 for invalid series, 200 with enhanced world

GET_emotional_arc.evidence: Returns 401 without auth, 404 for invalid series, 200 with arc array containing episode/title/avg_emotion/dominant_emotion/tension

cta_placement_ab_experiment.evidence: Experiment seeded with 3 variants (cta_top, cta_bottom, cta_floating), primary_event 'generate_click', AB assign returns correct variant_data with cta_position

dashboard_resume_your_story.evidence: Section displays series cards with Series badge, episode count, genre, timestamp, link to timeline

timeline_branch_share_enhance.evidence: Share button shows Shared/Share state, Branch button on episodes, Enhance buttons for characters/world visible

public_series_page.evidence: Page loads at /series/:seriesId without auth, shows series info/characters/world, Create Your Own CTA

ui_consistency_min_heights.evidence: Tool cards min-h-[80px] TRUE, Trending cards h-full TRUE, Recent items min-h-[56px] TRUE

phase1_regression.evidence: All 8 Phase 1 APIs still work: create, my-series, get-series, plan-episode, generate-episode, suggestions, update-memory, episode-status
